title: M0: zinc builds hello-world + aeson + http-client
description: De-risk zinc no-solver git-pinned dep model before leaning on aeson/http-client. Prove a hello-world pulling both builds under zinc.

title: M5: LLM effect + scripted interpreter; loop runs on canned replies
description: LLM effect (Complete). runLLMScripted (State [Text]). runAgent control loop end-to-end on scripted replies. Scripted-loop tests (BAML test-block analog).

title: M3: Prompt + Decision + fromModel wiring
description: Decision tool answer = CallTool|Done. Prompt input output (renderMessages injects schema @output; decode). fromModel @a = schema + SAP + decode.

title: M4: Pure reduce + tests
description: reduce :: AgentState -> Decision ToolCall answer -> Step answer (Continue|Halt). Pure, property/unit tested.

title: M2: SAP parser + golden tests
description: Schema-aligned parser: parseSAP :: Schema -> Text -> Either ParseError Value. Forgiving: code fences, leading/trailing prose, trailing commas, best-effort partial objects. The meaty bit. Golden fixture tests. Defer streaming to v2.

title: M1: Schema + Generics derivation + golden tests
description: HasSchema class, Schema language (SObj/SArr/SEnum/SStr/SNum/SBool/SOpt), GHC Generics default. v1: records, nullary-sum enums, Maybe, lists, Text/Int/Double/Bool. Golden snapshot tests.

title: Crucible v1: typed prompts + tool calls eDSL
description: Exploration/learning eDSL inspired by BAML + 12-factor-agents. effectful substrate, own schema+SAP parser, Anthropic+scripted+recording interpreters. See docs/specs/2026-06-05-crucible-design.md

title: M7: Tools effect + capability typing + example agent
description: Tools effect (Dispatch), runTools registry. Tool es with per-tool effect rows; agent row = union (authority creep = compile error). One 2-3 tool example agent as dogfood + test/eval target.

title: M6: Anthropic interpreter + recordLLM cassettes
description: runLLMAnthropic (one model). recordLLM reinterpret wrapping real interp, writes (req,resp) cassettes. First live run.

title: M8: Eval harness (datasets, scorers, report, cassette replay)
description: Case/Expectation (Exactly/Predicate/Rubric), Scorer, runEval -> Report (pass-rate/mean/variance/per-case, JSON+table). LLM-as-judge is itself a Prompt. Run live or vs cassettes.
